privileged_info_summary: The board_game_value_analyzer task uses a synthetic dataset of 10 real board games (Wingspan, Catan, Pandemic Legacy, Monopoly, Gloomhaven, Ticket to Ride, Azul, Unmatched, Splendor, 7 Wonders) with synthetic prices and play counts. All mathematical claims are verified correct: normalization formulas correctly convert 1-5 scale via (rating-1)/4 and 1-10 scale via (rating-1)/9 to 0-1 range; cost-per-play formula correctly handles zero plays by returning original cost; calculated example values match expected results (Wingspan $3.33/play and 0.89 normalized rating, Catan $2.00/play and 0.75 normalized rating, Gloomhaven $140/play and 0 normalized rating, Ticket to Ride $1.46/play and 0.78 normalized rating, with corresponding value scores). The dataset contains explicit rating scale assignments with 5 games using 1-5 scale and 4 games using 1-10 scale, plus Gloomhaven with no rating.
